name: feature.campaign-studio.nodes
description: Campaign-studio canvas producer node pack (ADR 0153 Phase 3). The `render` node emits a typed `canvas.campaign` artifact — { name, objective?, audience?, channels[], funnel?, assets? } — that flows through the run-output producer (ADR 0083) and renders inline in the chat artifact workbench. Constrained typed JSON, never executable code; pure transform; replay-safe.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Render campaign
nodes.description: Emit a `canvas.campaign` artifact. Inputs: { campaign } (or `source` JSON) = { name, objective?, audience?, channels: [{ name, type, tactic?, budget? }], funnel?: [{ stage, description?, kpis? }], assets?: [{ channel?, format?, headline?, body?, cta? }] }. Output: a typed canvas.campaign artifact. Pure transform.
